Hi Product Hunt! This is Tammy 👋 We’re excited to launch V2Fun today.

Creating a usable 3D character is still too fragmented. You often need one tool for modeling, another for texturing, another for animation, and sometimes even a motion capture setup just to make the character move.

V2Fun brings these steps into one AI-powered workflow.

You can start with an image or text prompt, generate a 3D character, enhance it with 8K textures, and bring it to life using AI motion capture from regular videos.

With this launch, we’re especially excited to introduce two new features:

- 8K textures for more detailed and presentation-ready 3D characters

- AI motion capture to turn regular videos into character motion [...] Subscribe

It helps creators turn images, prompts, and videos into high-quality 3D models, enhance assets with advanced 8K texture generation, and create motion-ready characters without switching between separate modeling, texturing, and mocap tools. V2Fun also supports image generation through models including Nano Banana and others, so creators can explore visual concepts and bring them into 3D faster. [...] Overview

AI Generative Media

V2Fun is an AI 3D creation platform built with self-developed 3D modeling and AI motion capture models. It helps creators turn images, prompts, and videos into high-quality 3D models, enhance assets with advanced 8K texture generation, and create motion-ready characters without switching between separate modeling, texturing, and mocap tools. V2Fun also supports image generation through models including Nano Banana and others, so creators can explore visual concepts and bring them into 3D faster.

I am an avid user of RADiCAL and have also collaborated with the team on my music videos. I cannot recommend them more highly. Firstly, the tech is top-notch and innovative and always produces a fabulous result. I’ve used it multiple times to great success. All you need is your iPhone and it’s super easy to use. Also the team is super knowledgeable and helpful with any questions. I’ve worked with Gavan, Alice, and the whole team and they have been amazing to work with. Super helpful and communicative. Hello Makers! We're excited to introduce you MODIF, the new AI content production app by Plask! 💃With Plask's motion capture API, you can easily add motion to any character. 🔮And now, with the new 'AI Drawing' feature, you can create unique and attention-grabbing content using images from your mobile phone. Join the community of over 10,000 users who have already downloaded MODIF since its April release. Our team is committed to adding more diverse effects for users to enjoy. so what are you waiting for?
